## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

- [ ] `clarinet check` passes
- [ ] SDK tests pass (`cd sdk && npm test`)
- [ ] App builds without errors (`npx expo export --platform web`)

## Checklist

- [ ] No sensitive data (mnemonics, private keys) committed
- [ ] SOL/Solana references replaced with STX/Stacks
- [ ] Contract addresses updated if needed
